charge_type.source: Both defendants were jointly charged with one count of conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely on an unknown date between December 2022 and the 27th day of December 2022, in a room in Yau Tong, they conspired to unlawfully traffic in cocaine.

drugs.source: Upon search, the police found a paper wrapping containing two plastic bags containing a total of 42 grammes of a solid containing 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotic. This is Exhibit E1.

roles.source: Counsel said that his role was more like a courier taking the drug from the Lei Yue Mun Plaza back to the room.

mitigating_factors.source: because of the telephone number provided by the 1st defendant in his video-recorded interviews, that is the number of 52297634, and his identification of the circumstances of that call, it eventually led to a positive arrest by the police.... the prosecution confirmed that as a result of checking or enquiry of that telephone number, they identified a certain person and eventually, about 152.26 grammes of cocaine was found at that person’s home.

guilty_plea.source: They pleaded guilty to the offence on 3 February this year before a magistrate and were committed to the High Court for sentence.

starting_point.source: So for 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotics, on a mathematical calculation, the starting point would be one of 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

sentence_after_role.source: Inferred as starting point since role adjustment not provided

notional_sentence.source: So for 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotics, on a mathematical calculation, the starting point would be one of 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

mitigation_reduction.source: In respect of the 1st defendant’s assistance or the information offered by him in the video-recorded interviews that led to the arrest of one further person for drug trafficking activities, I do bear in mind the principles stated in the case of HKSAR v Lo Sze Tung Stephanie ... I am agreeable to give him a slight further discount for the information provided to the police.

final_sentence.source: Having considered all the circumstances, I am agreeable to give him a slight further discount for the information provided to the police. So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty. The resulting sentence for the 1st defendant is 4 years and 2 months’ imprisonment.

charge_type.source: Both defendants were jointly charged with one count of conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely on an unknown date between December 2022 and the 27th day of December 2022, in a room in Yau Tong, they conspired to unlawfully traffic in cocaine.

drugs.source: Upon search, the police found a paper wrapping containing two plastic bags containing a total of 42 grammes of a solid containing 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotic. This is Exhibit E1.

roles.source: he had rented the room and did not lock it, apparently for the purpose of allowing others to use it whenever they wanted. Apparently, his role was slightly more culpable than that of the 1st defendant.

mitigating_factors.source: Counsel urged this court to exercise its discretion to give him further discount because of his psychiatric conditions.... While that do not in fact amount to any real mitigation, I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month.

guilty_plea.source: They pleaded guilty to the offence on 3 February this year before a magistrate and were committed to the High Court for sentence.

starting_point.source: Having considered all the circumstances of the conspiracy, I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

sentence_after_role.source: Inferred as starting point since role adjustment not provided

notional_sentence.source: Having considered all the circumstances of the conspiracy, I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

mitigation_reduction.source: While that do not in fact amount to any real mitigation, I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month.

final_sentence.source: As such, he is entitled to the full one-third discount which reduce the sentence to 4 years and 5 months’ imprisonment. Counsel also submitted that this court can give him a discretionary reduction of sentence because of his mental condition.... I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month. So the sentence in respect of the 2nd defendant is 4 years and 4 months’ imprisonment.
